title: London (Central Southwestern Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
London, which is located about 200 kilometres southwest of Toronto, is a multicultural city with an active and welcoming Francophone community. This dynamic community supports the integration of newcomers and promotes cultural exchange. It plays an essential role in the city’s cultural mosaic by helping French speakers flourish and preserve their identity.
